publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-11-04 23:05:04 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Records of the Dean include files on admissions, the Advisory Council, committees, convocations, dean's reports, directories, international legal studies, and student activities; files from the Law School's participation in University-wide groups, committees, and meetings; and files pertaining to the Law School's participation in state, national, and international organizations.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: William Ray Forrester. Papers, #18-1-2304. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: William Ray Forrester was Dean of the Cornell Law School, 1962-1973.

scopecontent.p: Arranged front to back of box
